title: Forbidden release files
summary: Release payloads should not include executable archives, packaged artifacts, or other files that WordPress.org review commonly flags.

detection.notes: This rule should eventually expand to match the broader official file-type surface.

guidance.why_it_matters: Development and packaged binary artifacts are often not appropriate for WordPress.org release payloads.
guidance.fix: Remove forbidden files from the plugin directory or release archive before submission.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Low. This is a packaging concern.
